title: NANA Shareholder Elizabeth “Liz” Qaulluq Cravalho Appointed to U.S. Arctic Research Commission
summary: KOTZEBUE, AK – NANA is pleased to announce that Elizabeth “Liz” Qaulluq Cravalho, vice president of lands, has been appointed by President Joe Biden to serve on the U.S. Arctic Research Commission (USARC). She will serve as an industry member on the commission through February of 2024. Cravalho serv...
